title: Coffee Craft resourcepack
body:
# The preface
Initially, my friends and I made a resource pack for the [Coffee Craft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/coffee-craft) modpack. Now we have decided to make a separate project, where there will be only the resource pack.

# Description
Get the experience of using a beautiful interface in dark colors! You can view more details in the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/coffee-craft-resourcepack/gallery).

# Features
The resource pack contains components from mods that were used in the [Coffee Craft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/coffee-craft) modpack, they should not interfere with the vanilla game. But if they bother you, and you understand the structure of resource packs, then you can remove unnecessary components)

# License
- You can use this in your builds
- If you want to make your resource pack based on ours, then you need permission from me and my friends or leave a link to this page!
